markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Align on GTM projects and review campaign performance.](https://fathom.video/share/ffbWg7VrGSSyU91UzkBB2GTwX_72gzxQ?tab=summary&timestamp=238.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Clay Enrichment Launching:** The Clay enrichment table goes live tomorrow, enabling automatic enrichment of all new contacts from newsletters and events.](https://fathom.video/share/ffbWg7VrGSSyU91UzkBB2GTwX_72gzxQ?tab=summary&timestamp=343.0)
  - [**New Pipeline Strategy:** A new campaign will drive direct-to-sales pipeline by offering "strategy sessions" to lookalike audiences (e.g., Lovable, Webflow).](https://fathom.video/share/ffbWg7VrGSSyU91UzkBB2GTwX_72gzxQ?tab=summary&timestamp=396.0)
  - [**Growth Cafe Performance Dip:** The February Growth Cafe underperformed (50% attendance vs. 90% in Jan) due to a shorter promo window (2 vs. 5 weeks) and weaker copy.](https://fathom.video/share/ffbWg7VrGSSyU91UzkBB2GTwX_72gzxQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1243.0)
  - [**Strong Outreach Results:** Recent campaigns yielded 74 positive replies in one week, including a HeyReach campaign with a 40% reply rate.](https://fathom.video/share/ffbWg7VrGSSyU91UzkBB2GTwX_72gzxQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1140.0)

## Topics

### New Pipeline Generation Strategy

  - [**Goal:** Shift from top-of-funnel events to direct pipeline generation for sales.](https://fathom.video/share/ffbWg7VrGSSyU91UzkBB2GTwX_72gzxQ?tab=summary&timestamp=396.0)
  - [**Experiment:** Test a direct-to-sales model with lookalike audiences for Lovable and Webflow.](https://fathom.video/share/ffbWg7VrGSSyU91UzkBB2GTwX_72gzxQ?tab=summary&timestamp=396.0)
  - [**Rollout Plan:** If successful, expand to other verticals (Fintech, Security, Dev Tools) using relevant customer case studies.](https://fathom.video/share/ffbWg7VrGSSyU91UzkBB2GTwX_72gzxQ?tab=summary&timestamp=436.0)
  - [**Recommended Outreach Flow:**](https://fathom.video/share/ffbWg7VrGSSyU91UzkBB2GTwX_72gzxQ?tab=summary&timestamp=695.0)
    1.  [**Initial Ask:** Offer a low-friction "strategy session."](https://fathom.video/share/ffbWg7VrGSSyU91UzkBB2GTwX_72gzxQ?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
    2.  [**Positive Reply:** Send the promised asset with a light offer for a strategy session.](https://fathom.video/share/ffbWg7VrGSSyU91UzkBB2GTwX_72gzxQ?tab=summary&timestamp=751.0)
    3.  [**No Reply:** Follow up with a case study (e.g., Lovable's results) to re-pitch the session.](https://fathom.video/share/ffbWg7VrGSSyU91UzkBB2GTwX_72gzxQ?tab=summary&timestamp=695.0)
  - [**Domain Strategy:** Use `growthx.ai` domains for general outreach to leverage brand recognition. Reserve `checkthat.com` domains for Check That-specific campaigns to avoid confusion.](https://fathom.video/share/ffbWg7VrGSSyU91UzkBB2GTwX_72gzxQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1777.0)

### Clay Enrichment Table Launch

  - [**Status:** Launching tomorrow.](https://fathom.video/share/ffbWg7VrGSSyU91UzkBB2GTwX_72gzxQ?tab=summary&timestamp=343.0)
  - [**Purpose:** Automatically enrich all new contacts from newsletters and events.](https://fathom.video/share/ffbWg7VrGSSyU91UzkBB2GTwX_72gzxQ?tab=summary&timestamp=290.0)
  - [**Pre-Launch Check:** Investigate a discrepancy in the enrichment status field to ensure all contacts are processed correctly.](https://fathom.video/share/ffbWg7VrGSSyU91UzkBB2GTwX_72gzxQ?tab=summary&timestamp=362.0)

### Campaign Performance Review

  - [**HeyReach (LinkedIn):**](https://fathom.video/share/ffbWg7VrGSSyU91UzkBB2GTwX_72gzxQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1140.0)
      - [Sent: 88 connection requests](https://fathom.video/share/ffbWg7VrGSSyU91UzkBB2GTwX_72gzxQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1140.0)
      - [Positive Replies: 17 (17%)](https://fathom.video/share/ffbWg7VrGSSyU91UzkBB2GTwX_72gzxQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1140.0)
      - [Reply Rate: \~40% (vs. 20–25% benchmark)](https://fathom.video/share/ffbWg7VrGSSyU91UzkBB2GTwX_72gzxQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1140.0)
      - [**Significance:** High reply rate is attributed to targeting Fletch engagers/followers.](https://fathom.video/share/ffbWg7VrGSSyU91UzkBB2GTwX_72gzxQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1140.0)
  - [**Instantly (Email):**](https://fathom.video/share/ffbWg7VrGSSyU91UzkBB2GTwX_72gzxQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1224.0)
      - [Sent: 11,000 emails](https://fathom.video/share/ffbWg7VrGSSyU91UzkBB2GTwX_72gzxQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1224.0)
      - [Positive Replies: 57](https://fathom.video/share/ffbWg7VrGSSyU91UzkBB2GTwX_72gzxQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1224.0)
          - [32 from Fletch Engagers/Followers campaign](https://fathom.video/share/ffbWg7VrGSSyU91UzkBB2GTwX_72gzxQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1224.0)
          - [21 from Fletch Cold campaign](https://fathom.video/share/ffbWg7VrGSSyU91UzkBB2GTwX_72gzxQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1224.0)
  - [**Growth Cafe (February):**](https://fathom.video/share/ffbWg7VrGSSyU91UzkBB2GTwX_72gzxQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1243.0)
      - [**Problem:** Significant drop in performance vs. January.](https://fathom.video/share/ffbWg7VrGSSyU91UzkBB2GTwX_72gzxQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1243.0)
      - [**Metrics:**](https://fathom.video/share/ffbWg7VrGSSyU91UzkBB2GTwX_72gzxQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1380.0)
          - Attendees: \<40 (vs. \~400 in Jan)
          - [Attendance Rate: 50% (vs. 90% in Jan)](https://fathom.video/share/ffbWg7VrGSSyU91UzkBB2GTwX_72gzxQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1380.0)
      - [**Root Causes:**](https://fathom.video/share/ffbWg7VrGSSyU91UzkBB2GTwX_72gzxQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1396.0)
          - [**Promo Window:** 2 weeks (vs. 5 weeks in Jan).](https://fathom.video/share/ffbWg7VrGSSyU91UzkBB2GTwX_72gzxQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1396.0)
          - [**Copy:** Weaker messaging that resonated less.](https://fathom.video/share/ffbWg7VrGSSyU91UzkBB2GTwX_72gzxQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1243.0)
      - [**Solution:** Test a 3-week promo window for the next event.](https://fathom.video/share/ffbWg7VrGSSyU91UzkBB2GTwX_72gzxQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1396.0)

### Upcoming Campaigns

  - [**AEO Event (March 5):**](https://fathom.video/share/ffbWg7VrGSSyU91UzkBB2GTwX_72gzxQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1462.0)
      - [**Status:** Paused.](https://fathom.video/share/ffbWg7VrGSSyU91UzkBB2GTwX_72gzxQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1648.0)
      - [**Reason:** Copy is being updated to reflect new research and a deeper focus on CheckVet.](https://fathom.video/share/ffbWg7VrGSSyU91UzkBB2GTwX_72gzxQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1462.0)
      - [**Action:** Mark will use the new copy to launch the campaign.](https://fathom.video/share/ffbWg7VrGSSyU91UzkBB2GTwX_72gzxQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1648.0)
  - [**Segmented Outreach:**](https://fathom.video/share/ffbWg7VrGSSyU91UzkBB2GTwX_72gzxQ?tab=summary&timestamp=811.0)
      - [**Target:** ICP contacts from the "Outbound Sync" segment in HubSpot.](https://fathom.video/share/ffbWg7VrGSSyU91UzkBB2GTwX_72gzxQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1740.0)
      - [**Offer:** Direct consulting offer (AEO/GEO).](https://fathom.video/share/ffbWg7VrGSSyU91UzkBB2GTwX_72gzxQ?tab=summary&timestamp=923.0)
      - [**Status:** Jesus is currently running this manually.](https://fathom.video/share/ffbWg7VrGSSyU91UzkBB2GTwX_72gzxQ?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
      - [**Action:** Jesus will share current copy for feedback.](https://fathom.video/share/ffbWg7VrGSSyU91UzkBB2GTwX_72gzxQ?tab=summary&timestamp=951.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Naufal:** Launch Clay enrichment table by tomorrow.](https://fathom.video/share/ffbWg7VrGSSyU91UzkBB2GTwX_72gzxQ?tab=summary&timestamp=343.0)
  - [**Mark:**](https://fathom.video/share/ffbWg7VrGSSyU91UzkBB2GTwX_72gzxQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1839.0)
      - [Send the Webflow lookalike list to Jason.](https://fathom.video/share/ffbWg7VrGSSyU91UzkBB2GTwX_72gzxQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1839.0)
      - [Launch the AEO event campaign using the new copy.](https://fathom.video/share/ffbWg7VrGSSyU91UzkBB2GTwX_72gzxQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1648.0)
  - [**Jesus:** Share current "Outbound Sync" campaign copy in the Understory channel for feedback.](https://fathom.video/share/ffbWg7VrGSSyU91UzkBB2GTwX_72gzxQ?tab=summary&timestamp=951.0)
  - [**Jason:** Review the Lovable lookalike list and provide feedback.](https://fathom.video/share/ffbWg7VrGSSyU91UzkBB2GTwX_72gzxQ?tab=summary&timestamp=981.0)
  - [**Gloria:** Provide updated AEO event copy to Mark.](https://fathom.video/share/ffbWg7VrGSSyU91UzkBB2GTwX_72gzxQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1462.0)
